case_title: CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO VS. AMARJIT SINGH GURAYA et al

docket_entries.description: DISMISSAL OF ENTIRE ACTION OF ALL PARTIES AND ALL CAUSES OF ACTION WITH PREJUDICE

PERSONAL INJURY/PROPERTY DAMAGE - VEHICLE RELATED, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO AS TO DEFENDANT GURAYA, AMARJIT SINGH DOES 1 TO 20 SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE SCHEDULED FOR JUN-12-2013 PROOF OF SERVICE DUE ON                  APR-09-2013 CASE MANAGEMENT STATEMENT DUE ON         MAY-28-2013
ASSIGNED TO ARBITRATION FOR JUL-08-2013. JUN-12-2013 CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE IS OFF CALENDAR. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
ARBITRATOR DANIEL JOSEPH KELLY APPOINTED. ARBITRATOR'S JURISDICTION JUL-08-2013 THROUGH OCT-06-2013.
ANSWER TO COMPLAINT FILED BY DEFENDANT GURAYA, AMARJIT SINGH
ASSIGNMENT TO ARBITRATION OF JUL-08-2013 IS OFF CALENDAR. DISMISSAL ON FILE.
SUMMONS ON COMPLAINT, PROOF OF SERVICE ONLY, FILED BY PLAINTIFF CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO SERVED FEB-12-2013, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT GURAYA, AMARJIT SINGH
